title: Agaya Gangai
tagline: Agaya Gangai — heritage city of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Agaya Gangai (English: Ganges of sky) is a waterfall located in Kolli Hills of the Eastern Ghats, in Namakkal district, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Agaya Gangai (English: Ganges of sky) is a waterfall located in Kolli Hills of the Eastern Ghats, in Namakkal district, Tamil Nadu, India. It falls from a height of 300 feet (91 m) and is formed by the Aiyaru river. Agaya Gangai is also known as Peraruvi and can be reached by climbing down 1196 steps. The caves of sages Bogar, Agastyar, Korakkar and Kalangi Nathar are located near the waterfalls inside the forest.

topPlaces.name: Arapaleeswarar Temple, Kolli Hills
topPlaces.description: Arapaleeswarar temple, Kolli Malai, also known as Arappalli is a Siva temple in Kolli Hills in Namakkal District in Tamil Nadu (India).

topPlaces.name: Semmedu
topPlaces.description: Semmedu is a Town in Kollimalai Taluk, Namakkal district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. It is the headquarter of the Kollihils block.

topPlaces.name: Kolli Hills
topPlaces.description: Kolli Malai, also known as Kolli Hills, is a hill station and taluk in Namakkal district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Balakrishnampatti
topPlaces.description: Balakrishnampatti is a Panchayat town in Thuraiyur taluk, Tiruchirappalli District in the state of Tamil Nadu, India.

itinerary.title: Day 1 — Arapaleeswarar Temple, Kolli Hills & around

items.note: Arapaleeswarar temple, Kolli Malai, also known as Arappalli is a Siva temple in Kolli Hills in Namakkal District in Tamil Nadu (India).
Semmedu is a Town in Kollimalai Taluk, Namakkal district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. It is the headquarter of the Kollihils block.
Kolli Malai, also known as Kolli Hills, is a hill station and taluk in Namakkal district, Tamil Nadu, India.
Balakrishnampatti is a Panchayat town in Thuraiyur taluk, Tiruchirappalli District in the state of Tamil Nadu, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Agaya Gangai?
faq.a: The best time to visit Agaya Gangai is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Agaya Gangai?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (66 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (61 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Agaya Gangai?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Agaya Gangai at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Agaya Gangai?
faq.a: Stays in Agaya Gangai start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Agaya Gangai?
faq.a: The top attractions are Arapaleeswarar Temple, Kolli Hills, Semmedu, Kolli Hills, Balakrishnampatti.
